class.name: MyNode
class.description: A sample node that demonstrates exported properties, signals, and method bindings in a GDExtension class. Emits a [signal tick] signal once per second, scaled by [member speed].

method.name: get_speed
method.description: Returns the current tick speed multiplier.

members.member: Controls how fast the [signal tick] signal is emitted. A value of 2.0 emits twice per second.

signal.name: tick
signal.description: Emitted once per second, scaled by [member speed].
